subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that shineth between the heavens and the earth. Blessed is he who hath been illumined by it on this Day wherein singeth forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح یلوح بین السموات و الارض طوبی لمن لاح به فی هذا الیوم الذی فیه تغرد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
